description_long: This is a compact, armored combat tactical vehicle with an angular, faceted body constructed primarily from metal plating. The vehicle features a sloped front with two prominent hatches, a small turret or cupola on the roof, and a long-barreled weapon mounted on the right side. It has four robust wheels with visible tread, and a spare tire is mounted on the left side. The exterior is painted in a solid, light gray color, showing signs of wear and weathering. Antennas and various hatches, handles, and vision slits are distributed across the body, indicating its military purpose and crew accessibility.
description: A compact, angular armored vehicle with a light gray finish, four wheels, and a roof-mounted weapon. Features include sloped armor, hatches, and military detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored nose, two hatches, and the angular cupola with vision slits.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spare tire, side hatches, and the long-barreled weapon extending from the turret.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the angular back armor, rear hatches, and rear-mounted equipment.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the weapon mount, side armor, and additional access panels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible long-barreled weapon mount on the right side of the roof turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped, welded steel armor plating; thickness appears moderate with reinforced front and angular side panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid light gray paint scheme.
attribute_tire_type: Four all-terrain tires with visible tread pattern; one spare tire mounted on the left side.
